title: Danga estate
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Danga estate''' was the farmland on [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] owned by the [[Danga family]].

It bordered the [[Katarn estate]], and was burned to the ground by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] commandos in a raid in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]].

{{Loc-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''
